display.purpose: Section headlines under the kicker pattern.

title.purpose: Feature row titles and table headings.

body.purpose: Paragraph copy, capped near 75ch by column span.

mono.purpose: Inline code, command lines, YAML excerpts.

label.purpose: Kickers, tag/meta straplines, kbd content, footer links.

shadows.name: kbd-keycap
shadows.purpose: Flat 2px keycap shadow on <kbd> elements only.

shadows.name: demo-frame
shadows.purpose: Reserved for the hero demo video frame. The only accent-glow on the page.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Default easing for fade-up and reveal.

motion.name: glow-pulse
motion.purpose: The accent dot in the 'Built with Rust' hero pill.

motion.name: cursor-blink
motion.purpose: The underscore in '$ dtop_' logo and install CTA.

components.name: Primary Button (Install CTA)
components.description: The Install CTA in the navbar and mobile menu. Solid accent, mono uppercase, square.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; background: #00ff88; color: #0a0e17; padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-decoration: none; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); border: none; border-radius: 0; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00ff88; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button (Theme toggle)
components.description: Bordered ghost button. Hover lifts the border color and text color only.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost" aria-label="Toggle theme"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 3v1m0 16v1m9-9h-1M4 12H3m15.36 6.36l-.7-.7M6.34 6.34l-.7-.7m12.72 0l-.7.7M6.34 17.66l-.7.7M16 12a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0z"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2.25rem; height: 2.25rem; background: transparent; color: #8899aa; border: 1px solid #2d3d52; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: color 200ms, border-color 200ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #e2e8f0; border-color: #8899aa; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00ff88; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: kbd Keycap
components.description: Keyboard shortcut chip. Square, monospace, with a 2px flat keycap shadow.
components.css: .ds-kbd { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 2rem; padding: 0.375rem 0.625rem; background: #1a2332; color: #e2e8f0; border: 1px solid #2d3d52; border-radius: 0; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: 0 2px 0 #1e293b; }

components.name: Section Header
components.description: The signature page-section header: 12-col grid with mono kicker / italic display headline / offset prose.
components.html:
§ 02 / Install

Pick a package
manager.

Homebrew, Docker, Cargo, Nix, or the install script. One line. Same binary.
components.css: .ds-section-header { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(12, 1fr); column-gap: 1.5rem; align-items: end; padding-bottom: 1.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #2d3d52; margin-bottom: 4rem; } .ds-section-kicker { grid-column: span 2; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.22em; color: #00ff88; } .ds-section-headline { grid-column: span 7; margin: 0; font-family: Orbitron, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 4rem); font-weight: 800; line-height: 0.9; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #e2e8f0; } .ds-section-headline em { font-style: italic; color: #00ff88; } .ds-section-aside { grid-column: span 3; margin: 0; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.625; color: #8899aa; }

components.name: Install Method Card
components.description: Repeating bordered list-item card with a 1px header strip carrying a colored category dot.
components.html:
Homebrew
$ brew install amir20/dtop/dtop
components.css: .ds-install-card { border: 1px solid #1e293b; background: #141c2b; border-radius: 0; transition: border-color 200ms; } .ds-install-card:hover { border-color: #2d3d52; } .ds-install-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.625rem; padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #1e293b; } .ds-install-dot { width: 0.5rem; height: 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-install-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: #4a5e73; } .ds-install-body { padding: 1rem 1.25rem; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #e2e8f0; } .ds-install-prompt { color: #4a5e73; user-select: none; }

components.name: Inline Code Chip
components.description: Inline code chip used inside paragraph copy.
components.css: .ds-code-inline { display: inline-block; padding: 0.125rem 0.375rem; background: #1a2332; color: #e2e8f0; border: 1px solid #2d3d52; border-radius: 0; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Sticky top navbar. Solid background, no glassmorphism.
components.html:
$ dtop_
ConfigChangelog
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 4rem; padding: 0 1.5rem; background: #0a0e17; border-bottom: 1px solid #1e293b; } .ds-nav-logo { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.025em; color: #e2e8f0; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-prompt, .ds-nav-cursor { color: #00ff88; } .ds-nav-cursor { animation: ds-blink 1.2s step-end infinite; } @keyframes ds-blink { 0%, 49% { opacity: 1; } 50%, 100% { opacity: 0; } } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; } .ds-nav-links a { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.8rem; color: #8899aa; text-decoration: none; transition: color 200ms; } .ds-nav-links a:hover { color: #e2e8f0; }

narrative.overview:
`dtop` is a terminal program. The docs page is the program's manual page with a video clip pasted in. Every visual choice answers to that. The page is dense, left-aligned where it can be, sharp-edged everywhere (no rounded corners except the demo video frame), and runs at a low visual idle, the same way the binary runs at a low CPU idle.

The system rejects the developer-tool marketing reflex: gradient-mesh heroes, three identical icon-cards, glassmorphism navbars, neon-on-black drenched in glow shadows. It also rejects the opposite reflex, the retro-terminal costume: VT323 pixel display fonts, drenched amber CRT pastiche, ASCII art that decorates rather than informs. `dtop` is a real terminal tool, not a mood board for one.

Density beats spectacle. Show the demo video, list the flags, ship the install lines. Prose is connective tissue.
keyCharacteristics: Sharp-edged surfaces (radius 0). The only rounded element is the demo video frame.
Restrained color: tinted dark navy neutrals plus one terminal-green accent.
Sectioned like a printed reference: numbered '§ NN / Topic' kickers, one repeating header pattern.
Display type from Orbitron at extreme weight (800); mono for everything technical.
Motion is restrained: fade-up reveals, blinking cursor, glowing status dot. Nothing choreographed.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Terminal Green (#00ff88) is the single accent. It carries the cursor, the kickers, the italicized headline word, and hover/focus states. No other color does headline duty.

rules.name: The Categorical Palette Stays in Lists
rules.body: Tag colors (blue / purple / orange / cyan) appear only as 8px dots inside repeating list items. They never escape into headings, body type, borders, or backgrounds.

rules.name: The Tinted-Neutral Rule
rules.body: Every background, border, and 'gray' is tinted blue (hue ≈ 220–225). Pure black, pure white, and pure gray are forbidden.

rules.name: The Italic-Accent Rule
rules.body: In every section headline, the second line is italicized in Terminal Green. This is the system's only sanctioned use of italic display type.

rules.name: The Uppercase-Mono Rule
rules.body: Anything secondary, navigational, or metadata-shaped is set in JetBrains Mono, uppercase, 0.22em letter-spacing, 0.7rem.

rules.name: The No-Restated-Subhead Rule
rules.body: Section headlines are not followed by a paragraph that re-states them. The right-column aside must add information.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat. Containers are bordered, not elevated. The kbd 2px keycap shadow and the hero demo frame are the only sanctioned shadows.

rules.name: The Glow-Goes-on-the-Demo Rule
rules.body: The accent-dim outer glow is reserved for the demo video frame. It will never appear on a button, a CTA, a navbar, or a pill.

dos: Do use Terminal Green (#00ff88) as the only headline-italic / kicker / cursor color. Light theme uses #00a85a.
Do keep every container, button, kbd, card, and input at radius 0. The demo frame at 12px is the only exception.
Do open every section below the hero with '§ NN / Topic' in mono uppercase 0.22em letter-spacing 0.7rem accent.
Do italicize the second line of every section headline in accent color via <span class='italic text-(--c-accent)'>.
Do keep paragraphs in DM Sans at body line-height 1.65, capped at ~75ch by column span.
Do keep type tags / kickers / kbd / footer links / file paths in JetBrains Mono.
Do rely on borders, not shadows, to define cards. Hover should shift border color, not lift.
Do put the categorical tag colors only on 8px dots inside repeating list-item header strips.
Do use transition-colors, not transition-all, for hover states.
donts: Don't ship a gradient-mesh hero, a 'loved by teams at' logo strip, three identical icon-and-heading cards, or any other AI-driven landing-page archetype.
Don't dress the page in retro-terminal costume: VT323, pixel bitmap display fonts, drenched amber/green CRT pastiche, ASCII art that decorates rather than documents real behavior.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient. Headline emphasis comes from italic + accent color.
Don't add glassmorphism (backdrop-blur, backdrop-saturate) to the navbar, modals, or cards. The navbar is solid bg.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored side stripe on cards or callouts. Full 1px borders only.
Don't wrap the install-final $ dtop_ strip in a glow shadow. The accent-dim glow is reserved for the hero demo frame.
Don't introduce rounded corners on buttons, cards, kbd chips, install rows, flag rows, or config blocks.
Don't restate the section headline in the right-column aside.
Don't use the categorical tag colors (blue / purple / orange / cyan) for type, headings, borders, fills, or icons.
Don't ship ASCII diagrams, screenshots, or feature lists that imply behavior the binary doesn't have.
Don't add bounce, elastic, or scroll-driven choreographed motion. Motion vocabulary is fade-up, blink, glow-pulse.
Don't center every section. The numbered specimen pattern is left-aligned grid. The hero is the only intentionally centered surface.
